generation_prompt.music_prompt: Clean corporate innovation instrumental with modular synth pulse, precise soft percussion, restrained piano and warm harmonic layers, expressing organizational progress and confident transformation without a product-reveal drop.
generation_prompt.sound_effect_prompt: Optional restrained sonic accents that share the cue's timbre; keep them secondary to the musical identity.
generation_prompt.negative_prompt: No copyrighted melody imitation, no muddy low end, no abrupt style changes, no unnecessary lead vocals, and no generic stock-music ending.
generation_prompt.producer_notes: Keep the motif consistent across long-form narration, reserve the midrange for speech, and express progress through evolving layers rather than cinematic impact.
generation_prompt.arrangement_notes: Intro: establish a concise institutional motif over open space. Development: add modular pulse and restrained percussion in reusable layers. Peak: widen harmony for a measured progress statement without a reveal drop. Ending: resolve with calm confidence. Loop: provide a clean return to the opening pulse.

metadata.title: Sustainable Brand Organic
metadata.description: An organic brand-identity capability expressing responsibility, natural materials, transparency, and long-term trust through tactile acoustic-electronic production.

generation_prompt.music_prompt: Warm sustainable-brand instrumental blending tactile acoustic guitar, wood percussion, felt piano and restrained electronic air, communicating natural materials, transparency and long-term trust without luxury-tech polish.
generation_prompt.sound_effect_prompt: Optional restrained sonic accents that share the cue's timbre; keep them secondary to the musical identity.
generation_prompt.negative_prompt: No copyrighted melody imitation, no muddy low end, no abrupt style changes, no unnecessary lead vocals, and no generic stock-music ending.
generation_prompt.producer_notes: Let physical textures remain audible and human, avoid sentimental folk clichés, and keep the central organic motif simple enough to support brand memory.
generation_prompt.arrangement_notes: Intro: introduce one tactile acoustic identity mark. Development: grow wood percussion and warm harmonic layers naturally. Peak: present a modest trust statement with no oversized climax. Ending: allow an honest acoustic decay. Loop: reconnect the tail to the opening material texture.

metadata.title: Fintech Trust Signal
metadata.description: A precise financial-technology identity capability balancing security, operational clarity, calm confidence, and modern digital movement without launch spectacle.

generation_prompt.music_prompt: Calm fintech identity instrumental with a stable modular pulse, precise glass motif, controlled soft sub and muted digital textures, conveying payment security, operational clarity and dependable modern confidence.
generation_prompt.sound_effect_prompt: Optional restrained sonic accents that share the cue's timbre; keep them secondary to the musical identity.
generation_prompt.negative_prompt: No copyrighted melody imitation, no muddy low end, no abrupt style changes, no unnecessary lead vocals, and no generic stock-music ending.
generation_prompt.producer_notes: Prioritize tonal stability and repeated confirmation cues, keep transients reassuring rather than sharp, and avoid futuristic launch risers or luxury mystery.
generation_prompt.arrangement_notes: Intro: state a stable two-note trust motif. Development: introduce precise clicks and a calm modular pulse. Peak: complete a short confirmation phrase with controlled width. Ending: close on a secure tonal resolve. Loop: return seamlessly to the stable opening pulse.

metadata.title: Retail Momentum
metadata.description: A flexible retail music capability sustaining accessible product variety, positive purchasing momentum, and modular commercial pacing across categories.

generation_prompt.music_prompt: Accessible retail campaign instrumental with muted guitar, buoyant funk bass, crisp claps, bright mallet details and a clean modular groove that supports many products without sounding food-specific or overly urban.
generation_prompt.sound_effect_prompt: Optional restrained sonic accents that share the cue's timbre; keep them secondary to the musical identity.
generation_prompt.negative_prompt: No copyrighted melody imitation, no muddy low end, no abrupt style changes, no unnecessary lead vocals, and no generic stock-music ending.
generation_prompt.producer_notes: Build interchangeable four- and eight-bar sections for changing product groups, preserve a friendly midrange, and avoid category-specific sound effects or aggressive sales energy.
generation_prompt.arrangement_notes: Intro: open with a concise retail pickup. Development: establish a modular groove with replaceable product sections. Peak: add bright accents for a collection-wide lift. Ending: land on a clean commercial turnaround. Loop: reconnect directly to the opening pickup.

metadata.title: Architectural Real Estate
metadata.description: A spacious architectural music capability expressing material, proportion, place, and long-term value through slow structural development rather than a logo sting.

generation_prompt.music_prompt: Spacious architectural instrumental combining low strings, resonant piano, restrained glass tones, soft sub and wide air, expressing material detail, proportion, place identity and long-term property value.
generation_prompt.sound_effect_prompt: Optional restrained sonic accents that share the cue's timbre; keep them secondary to the musical identity.
generation_prompt.negative_prompt: No copyrighted melody imitation, no muddy low end, no abrupt style changes, no unnecessary lead vocals, and no generic stock-music ending.
generation_prompt.producer_notes: Shape depth through register and silence, let the harmony reveal scale gradually, and avoid short logo mnemonics, fashion groove, or sentimental cinematic storytelling.
generation_prompt.arrangement_notes: Intro: open with resonant space and one material motif. Development: add structural low strings and a measured pulse in clear layers. Peak: widen into a panoramic statement of scale. Ending: allow a long architectural resolution. Loop: provide a reduced ambient return for extended presentation.

metadata.title: Couture Orchestral Poise
metadata.description: A sculpted orchestral fashion capability using controlled asymmetry, refined string movement, and editorial tension without house groove or cinematic sentimentality.

generation_prompt.music_prompt: Refined couture orchestral instrumental with sculpted short strings, low-string weight, restrained pizzicato, dry editorial percussion and controlled asymmetrical movement, elegant without house groove or sentimental film scoring.
generation_prompt.sound_effect_prompt: Optional restrained sonic accents that share the cue's timbre; keep them secondary to the musical identity.
generation_prompt.negative_prompt: No copyrighted melody imitation, no muddy low end, no abrupt style changes, no unnecessary lead vocals, and no generic stock-music ending.
generation_prompt.producer_notes: Keep attacks tailored and precise, use silence as part of the fashion rhythm, and avoid lush emotional swells, dance-floor bass, or generic luxury ambience.
generation_prompt.arrangement_notes: Intro: state a poised string gesture in open space. Development: establish an asymmetrical walk with dry accents. Peak: form a brief sculpted couture statement without emotional excess. Ending: close with a tailored string cadence. Loop: offer a measured pickup into the opening gesture.

metadata.title: Organic Skincare Minimal
metadata.description: A close tactile skincare capability supporting natural care rituals, ingredient detail, and quiet wellbeing through sparse organic micro-textures.

generation_prompt.music_prompt: Sparse organic skincare instrumental with close soft plucks, subtle wood texture, breath-like pads, felt piano and generous silence, supporting ingredient detail and calm care rituals without glossy commercial bloom.
generation_prompt.sound_effect_prompt: Optional restrained sonic accents that share the cue's timbre; keep them secondary to the musical identity.
generation_prompt.negative_prompt: No copyrighted melody imitation, no muddy low end, no abrupt style changes, no unnecessary lead vocals, and no generic stock-music ending.
generation_prompt.producer_notes: Keep every sound close and tactile, preserve natural transients and breathing space, and avoid shimmer-heavy beauty ambience, cafe swing, or overt emotional melody.
generation_prompt.arrangement_notes: Intro: begin with breath and one close organic touch. Development: add sparse ingredient-like details and a soft pulse. Peak: allow a gentle harmonic bloom that remains intimate. Ending: fade through natural room decay. Loop: join the final breath invisibly to the opening texture.

metadata.title: Crystalline Jewelry Signature
metadata.description: A precise fine-jewelry sonic identity capability expressing facets, rarity, craftsmanship, and lasting value through crystalline micro-detail.

generation_prompt.music_prompt: Pristine fine-jewelry identity instrumental built from a single crystalline motif, delicate metallic overtones, precise glass reflections, restrained soft sub and polished air, revealing craftsmanship and rarity in microscopic detail.
generation_prompt.sound_effect_prompt: Optional restrained sonic accents that share the cue's timbre; keep them secondary to the musical identity.
generation_prompt.negative_prompt: No copyrighted melody imitation, no muddy low end, no abrupt style changes, no unnecessary lead vocals, and no generic stock-music ending.
generation_prompt.producer_notes: Give each overtone enough silence to read as a facet, keep the low end discreet, and avoid broad luxury pads, beauty shimmer wash, or a generic corporate logo sting.
generation_prompt.arrangement_notes: Intro: expose one crystalline facet motif. Development: layer precise harmonic reflections with generous silence. Peak: complete a short unmistakable jewelry signature reveal. Ending: leave a pristine metallic decay. Loop: provide a subtle reflected pickup for longer product detail sequences.

metadata.title: Intimate Romance Score
metadata.description: An intimate relationship-scoring capability for affection, vulnerability, hesitation, and unresolved emotional connection while preserving dialogue space.

generation_prompt.music_prompt: Intimate romance score with close felt piano, soft cello, restrained chamber strings, warm room tone and breathing silence, supporting vulnerable affection and relationship tension while leaving dialogue fully clear.
generation_prompt.sound_effect_prompt: Optional restrained sonic accents that share the cue's timbre; keep them secondary to the musical identity.
generation_prompt.negative_prompt: No copyrighted melody imitation, no muddy low end, no abrupt style changes, no unnecessary lead vocals, and no generic stock-music ending.
generation_prompt.producer_notes: Use harmonic hesitation and small human timing variations, keep the emotional peak private rather than cinematic, and avoid nostalgic life-journey framing or melodramatic swells.
generation_prompt.arrangement_notes: Intro: begin with a hesitant two-note piano exchange. Development: let cello and chamber strings move toward emotional closeness. Peak: allow one restrained relational swell. Ending: leave a tender partly unresolved cadence. Loop: provide only a subtle room-tone bridge for scenes requiring continuation.

metadata.title: Investigative Documentary Pulse
metadata.description: A restrained investigative documentary capability supporting evidence, inquiry, interviews, and unfolding facts with measured tension rather than thriller pressure.

generation_prompt.music_prompt: Restrained investigative documentary underscore with a measured low pulse, subtle metallic ticks, muted piano, controlled low strings and granular room texture, advancing evidence and inquiry without thriller pressure.
generation_prompt.sound_effect_prompt: Optional restrained sonic accents that share the cue's timbre; keep them secondary to the musical identity.
generation_prompt.negative_prompt: No copyrighted melody imitation, no muddy low end, no abrupt style changes, no unnecessary lead vocals, and no generic stock-music ending.
generation_prompt.producer_notes: Maintain factual neutrality, let small rhythmic changes mark new evidence, protect narration intelligibility, and avoid horror drones, action impacts, or purely reflective interview warmth.
generation_prompt.arrangement_notes: Intro: pose a sparse musical question over neutral room tone. Development: introduce a measured evidence pulse and irregular ticks. Peak: tighten the inquiry briefly without becoming a thriller. Ending: stop on a controlled unresolved fact. Loop: return invisibly to the opening question for long investigation sequences.
